meta.title: Build integration delivery services with Kafka, RabbitMQ and Effect error handling

subtask.role: You are a TypeScript Engineer specializing in Effect and Bun/Elysia. Implement subtask 3.3.

context.overview: Implement the core delivery functionality including Kafka message consumption, RabbitMQ task queue processing, OAuth2 token management, and delivery services with Effect.retry and exponential backoff.
context.parent_task: Build Integration Service with Effect (Nova - Bun/Elysia)

requirements.description: Create CRUD endpoints for integration management, implement Kafka consumer using Effect Stream for real-time message processing, set up RabbitMQ task queue with Effect-based job processing, build delivery services for Slack/Discord/email/webhooks with Effect.retry and exponential backoff, implement OAuth2 token refresh with Effect.cached, add template rendering service with Effect error handling, create comprehensive logging and monitoring
